zh.Legnica, Lower Silesia, Poland: 波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica於1281年出生在波蘭希利a斯吉時，她的父親Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica34歲，母親Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast20歲。她於1297年與Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1347年4月4日在義大利享年66歲，埋葬在奧地利提洛爾梅朗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica于1281年出生在波兰希利a斯吉时，她的父亲Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica34岁，母亲Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast20岁。她于1297年与Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1347年4月4日在意大利享年66岁，埋葬在奥地利提洛爾梅朗。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Eufemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica was born in 1281, in Silesia, Poland, her father, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, was 20. She married Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain in 1297. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 4 April 1347, in Italy, at the age of 66, and was buried in Meran, Tirol, Austria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica est née en 1281, à śląskie, Pologne, son père, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain en 1297. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 avril 1347, à Italie, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Meran, Tirol, Autriche.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica 1281 in śląskie, Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast 20. Sie hat 1297 Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. April 1347 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Italien und wurde in Meran, Tirol, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica è nata il nel 1281 nel śląskie, Polonia, sua padre, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain nel 1297. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 4 aprile 1347, nel Italia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Meran, Tirolo, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnicaが1281年にポーランドsルaスキで生まれた時，父Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnicaは34歳，母Elizabeth of Kalsz Piastは20歳であった。1297年にOtto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1347年4月4日にイタリアで66歳で死去し，オーストリアティロルメランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica(이)가 1281년 폴란드 sa스키에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1297년 Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1347년 4월 4일 이탈리아에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 티럴 머란에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica nasceu em 1281, em śląskie, Polônia, seu pai, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain em 1297. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de abril de 1347, em Itália, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Meran, Tirol, Áustria.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica родилась в 1281 г. в местности sлaски, Польша, её отцу по имени Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain в 1297 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 апреля 1347 г. в местности Италия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности миран, тирол, Австрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eufemia Piast von Silesia-Liegnitz of Legnica nació en 1281, en śląskie, Polonia, su papá, Duke Henryk V "Brzuchaty" Piast "the Fat" Duke of Legnica, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth of Kalsz Piast, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Otto III von Görtz Tirol und Kärnten Krain en 1297. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de abril de 1347, en Italia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Meran, Tirol, Austria.
